about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Meet the Skinlab team and our story
about.storyParagraph1: It all started with a cosmetic treatment abroad. Simonetta was traveling when she noticed that Western salons were using an entirely different caliber of equipment — more precise, more advanced, more professional machines that Hungarian beauticians could only dream of at the time. On her way home, one thought kept spinning: why couldn't these machines be brought to Hungary too?
about.storyParagraph2: That evening she told László about it, and he didn't just agree — he was instantly hooked. What excited him was the technical side: how do these lasers actually work, what's inside them, what makes them tick. When they ordered their first machine together, László took it apart immediately, studied every component, and understood it down to the last screw. That's how a truly powerful duo was born: Simonetta with beauty industry expertise and a medical mindset, László with hands-on engineering skills and real service experience.
about.storyParagraph3: {companyName} grew out of that shared passion, and it quickly became clear there was a real demand for it. Finally, someone was bringing world-class standards to Hungary: professional equipment at fair prices, with in-house service and the kind of support where you're never left on your own after the purchase.

founder.technicalBio: I've been taking apart and tuning cars since I was a teenager, so the world of machines has always been second nature to me. That hands-on, engineering mindset defines my work at Skinlab too: I'm responsible for making sure every device reaches our clients in flawless technical condition. If any issue comes up, we handle it in-house, quickly and professionally, with a loaner device for the duration of the repair. Laser technology has become my specialty over the years, and I can confidently say there's no malfunction I haven't encountered before. That kind of experience gives our clients real peace of mind, because they know their equipment is in safe hands.
founder.treatmentBio: I come from a medical family, and the beauty industry has fascinated me since I was very young. My medical background, however, taught me something essential: treatments must meet the same rigorous standards as medicine itself. It's not enough for something to work, it has to be safe. What matters most to me is that results are not only beautiful but also healthy, and that we never cross the boundaries of professional competence. We bring this philosophy into every consultation and product recommendation, because we only offer what we can stand behind with full confidence.

about.benefit1Desc: Direct manufacturer relationships, no unnecessary middlemen. Same quality, fraction of the price.
about.benefit2Desc: Machine arrives in 2 weeks, no waiting for months.
about.benefit3Desc: Double the industry standard. Full protection.

about.benefit5Desc: Local service center, loaner device during repairs.
about.benefit6Desc: We don't leave you alone after purchase. Call us anytime.

warranty.extendedWarrantyDesc: Extend your warranty by an additional year at a discounted price!

features.fullWarranty: Covers all parts and labor – double the industry standard.

steps.title: How does the service work?
steps.step1Desc: Call us or send an email describing the problem.
steps.step2Desc: We send a replacement via courier and collect the faulty one.
steps.step3Desc: We fix your device in our own workshop.
steps.step4Desc: You get back the repaired device, we collect the replacement.

warranty.description: Comprehensive 2-year manufacturer warranty with our own Hungarian service background, replacement device program and original spare parts.
warranty.whatIsWarrantyDesc1: A warranty is a binding commitment by the manufacturer and distributor that the device will operate without failure under intended use during the warranty period. In case of manufacturing or material defects, repair, part replacement and — where justified — replacement and labor are free of charge.
warranty.whatIsWarrantyDesc2: We provide 12-24 months of warranty on every new device (exact duration is on the product sheet), in line with Hungarian government decrees 151/2003. (IX. 22.) and 19/2014. (IV. 29.) NGM.
warranty.commitmentDesc1: Our own trained Hungarian technician team and workshop ensures that you do not have to wait months for foreign repair in case of a fault. We work with original factory parts and provide a replacement device for the duration of the repair so your business never stops.
warranty.commitmentDesc2: We stay by your side after the purchase as well: remote diagnostics, phone support and — if necessary — on-site visits keep your operation running continuously.
warranty.contentDesc: The manufacturer warranty includes the following cases, provided the fault occurred during normal use and with the user manual followed:
warranty.point1: Full repair of manufacturing and material defects.
warranty.point2: Replacement of original factory parts, including labor costs, free of charge.
warranty.point3: Replacement device program — we provide a free replacement machine during repair.
warranty.point4: Remote diagnostics and expert phone support for troubleshooting.
warranty.point5: On-site service visit where needed, by individual agreement.
warranty.exclusionsSubtitle: The warranty does not extend to the following cases:
warranty.exclusion1: Damage from misuse, negligence or careless handling.
warranty.exclusion2: Unauthorized modification, opening of the device or repair attempts by non-official service providers.
warranty.exclusion3: Damage from external events (drop, liquid damage, overvoltage, lightning strike).
warranty.exclusion4: Connection to improper electrical grid, missing stabilizer or grounding.
warranty.exclusion5: Normal wear of consumable parts (see below).
warranty.consumable2: Outer cover of handpieces and applicators
warranty.consumable6: External damage to cables and accessories
warranty.consumablesNote: The lifetime of consumables depends on usage intensity. We supply replacements continuously at favorable prices.
warranty.claimSubtitle: Report faults via the following channels:
warranty.claimInfoTitle: What to include in your report?
warranty.claimInfo1: Device type, serial number and date of purchase.
warranty.claimInfo2: Detailed description of the fault, if possible with photo or video.
warranty.claimInfo3: Invoice or warranty card received at purchase.
warranty.claimInfo4: Name and contact details of the point-of-contact person.
warranty.importantNote: Do not attempt to repair or disassemble the device yourself — unauthorized intervention voids the warranty. When you notice a fault, disconnect the machine and contact us.
warranty.ctaSubtitle: Our expert team is happy to help — call us or send an email.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Skinlab equipment, training, warranty and shipping.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Our team is happy to help with any specific question. Reach us by phone or message.

orderShipping.q1: How long does it take for the ordered machine to arrive?
orderShipping.a1: Professional cosmetic and aesthetic devices are made to order, so the typical delivery time is 15–25 working days. For custom colours or configurations this can even double. Accessories and supplies kept in stock ship within 1–4 working days.
orderShipping.q2: How does the machine arrive in the country?
orderShipping.a2: Every machine enters Hungary through DHL's official contracted channel with full customs clearance, authentic documentation and end-to-end tracking. We do not use dubious DDP workarounds — the process is legal, transparent and secure.
orderShipping.q3: What payment methods can I choose from?
orderShipping.a3: For custom-order machines, 50% of the total price is due as a deposit at the time of order, and the remaining 50% is payable on arrival, before handover. For discounted products the full amount is required upfront. Accepted methods: SimplePay card payment, bank transfer, and in our showroom cash or POS terminal payment.
orderShipping.q4: Where can I pick up the machine?
orderShipping.a4: Pickup can be arranged in person at our showroom ({showroom}), where we walk you through installation, training and documentation — free of charge, by prior appointment. If in-person pickup isn't possible, our contracted courier service handles delivery with individually quoted rates.

warrantyService.q1: What warranty comes with the machines?
warrantyService.a1: New cosmetic and medical aesthetic devices sold in our webshop come with a 12–24 month warranty (the exact duration is shown on each product page). The warranty covers manufacturing defects and failures during proper use. We follow Hungarian Government Decree 151/2003 (IX. 22.) and NGM Decree 19/2014 (IV. 29.).
warrantyService.q2: How long does a repair take?
warrantyService.a2: Turnaround for minor faults is 3–7 working days; for larger part replacements it's 10–20 working days. The precise time is confirmed after inspection. Repairs are carried out by our in-house trained technicians using original parts.
warrantyService.q3: Do I get a replacement machine during repair?
warrantyService.a3: Yes, on request we provide a loaner machine — free of charge under warranty, or at a reduced rate outside of warranty — so your business keeps running during service.
warrantyService.q4: What should I do if the machine shows an error or doesn't turn on?
warrantyService.a4: First, switch it off, disconnect power, let it cool and restart. If the fault persists, reach us at {phone} or {email} — remote diagnostics solve most issues.

training.q1: Do I get an official certificate after the training?
training.a1: Yes. All our training is registered in the Hungarian Adult Education Record System (FAR) and concludes with a B-number certificate. The certificate verifies your professional competence and your ability to apply the taught technologies safely and correctly.
training.q2: Do I have to buy a machine from you to attend the training?
training.a2: No. Our training is available without any purchase obligation, and we don't pressure attendees into a later equipment purchase. Our goal is real, practical knowledge — regardless of whether you buy equipment from us or another distributor.
training.q3: What do the training sessions cover?
training.a3: Our training is built on a healthcare background and clinically proven technology. We cover in-depth theory and practice: parameter settings, treatment protocols, risk factors, legal and documentation requirements, plus marketing and business modules.
training.q4: Does training come with the purchased machine?
training.a4: Yes. At handover or at a separately agreed time we provide theoretical training, treatment protocols, and detailed usage and maintenance guides — so you can start working with confidence from day one.

products.q1: Do I need an official permit to use a diode laser?
products.a1: For cosmetic use no government permit is required, but professional training and certification are strongly recommended for safe operation. Every machine we sell comes with safety documentation and CE certification, and our training equips you with all necessary knowledge.
products.q2: Which skin types are diode lasers suitable for?
products.a2: Multi-wavelength diode lasers (e.g. 755/808/1064 nm) are safe on most skin types year-round. For certain ND:YAG treatments there may be seasonal recommendations — these are always decided individually based on professional protocol.
products.q3: What is the lifespan of a laser handpiece?
products.a3: Most professional diode laser handpieces last 1–3 million shots, ND:YAG handpieces 1.2–1.8 million. Lifespan depends on energy settings and the cooling system. Handpieces are replaceable — our service team installs factory or compatible replacements.
products.q4: How safe are the machines you sell?
products.a4: Every machine has CE certification, authentic documentation and passed safety testing. With proper training and regular maintenance (6–12 month inspection recommended), operation is safe and reliable over the long term.

general.a1: Skinlab Beauty Equipment Kft. is the official distributor of professional cosmetic and medical aesthetic equipment in Hungary. We support our partners with authentic documentation, in-house service, 12–24 month warranty and FAR-registered training.
general.q2: How can I get in touch with you?
general.a2: You can reach us by phone at {phone} or by email at {email}. Our customer service is available Monday to Friday 10:00–18:00 and Saturday 10:00–14:00. You can also send us a message through our website form.
general.q3: Can I see the machines in person?
general.a3: Of course — the showroom ({showroom}) is open free of charge by appointment. You can try the devices live, get personalized advice from our experts and even discuss installation on the spot.

whyUs.title: Why Successful Salons Choose Skinlab?
whyUs.subtitle: We don't just sell machines – we help as partners to make your investment pay off as quickly as possible.
whyUs.trainingDesc: 4-6 hours of personal training + FAR certificate + video materials. We won't let you go until you use the machine confidently.
whyUs.warrantyDesc: No waiting weeks for foreign service. We respond within 24 hours, and if needed, we provide a replacement device.
whyUs.financingDesc: From ~€250/month. No need to pay all at once – the machine's revenue pays the installments.
whyUs.consultingDesc: We help with pricing and marketing. We share what successful salons do.
whyUs.testimonialText: The training was great, and I can call them anytime I have a question.

testimonials.title: What Our Partners Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from Hungarian salon owners
testimonials.quote1: The HELIOS paid for itself in 3 months. The training was professional, and having local service is reassuring. I used to work with IPL, this is night and day.
testimonials.quote2: In the first month alone, our revenue increased by 20% thanks to laser treatments. Our clients love it, and we love how easy it is to use.
testimonials.quote3: Since getting the HydraCrown, we've attracted a new client base. The AI skin diagnostics impresses them. Only downside: it needs more space than I expected.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy of Skinlab Beauty Equipment Kft. Learn about how we handle your personal data.
privacy.introTitle: What is a Privacy Policy and why is it important?
privacy.introText1: The purpose of this Privacy Policy is to transparently inform you about what personal data we collect, for what purposes we process it, how we ensure its protection, and what rights you have regarding data processing.
privacy.introText2: When using our webshop – including browsing, placing orders, customer service inquiries, or requesting certificates related to training – we handle the data you provide confidentially, in accordance with applicable laws, prioritizing data security and transparency.
privacy.section1Text: This privacy policy contains the rules for data processing in the webshop operated by {companyName}.
privacy.section4Title: 4. Purposes and Legal Bases of Data Processing
privacy.section6Text: Data is only transferred to the extent necessary for service provision:
privacy.noThirdCountryTransfer: We do not transfer data to third countries.
privacy.rightAccessDesc: You can request information about what data we process about you.
privacy.rightRectificationDesc: You can request the correction of inaccurate data.
privacy.rightErasureDesc: You can request the deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten").
privacy.rightRestrictionDesc: You can request the restriction of data processing.
privacy.rightPortabilityDesc: You can request your data in a machine-readable format.
privacy.rightObjectionDesc: You can object to data processing.
privacy.rightWithdrawDesc: You can withdraw your consent at any time.
privacy.section8Text: If you believe that you have suffered a legal violation in connection with our data processing, you can file a complaint with the following authority:
privacy.naihName: National Authority for Data Protection and Freedom of Information (NAIH)
privacy.section9Text: The Website uses cookies to improve user experience and ensure website functionality.
privacy.section9_1Text: These cookies are necessary for the basic operation of the Website and cannot be disabled.
privacy.section9_2Text: We use Google Analytics to analyze website traffic.
privacy.section10Text: The Data Controller applies appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data:
privacy.section11Text: This privacy policy may be modified from time to time. The current version is always available on the website.
privacy.section12Text: For privacy-related questions, please contact us at:

shipping.title: Shipping & payment
shipping.description: Transparent shipping terms and flexible payment options for our professional beauty equipment.
shipping.subtitle: Reliable, documented delivery and flexible payment plans — everything you need to know until the machine arrives.
shipping.professionalDesc: Most of our machines are built to order in professional quality, so delivery times differ from standard stock products. After order confirmation, we track the full manufacturing, quality check and shipping process and keep you informed with clear deadlines.
shipping.customConfigNote: For custom colors, configurations or during peak-demand periods the delivery time may double. The stated timeframe is indicative: international logistics conditions may cause delays, for which we cannot accept liability. The expected delivery deadline is always recorded in writing in the contract.
shipping.dhlPartnerTitle: We ship through our official logistics partner
shipping.dhlPartnerDesc: Every machine arrives in Hungary through our contracted international logistics partner under DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) terms — meaning all customs and import clearance is handled on our side, you do not have to worry about it.
shipping.dhlPoint1: Full customs clearance and import handling at our cost
shipping.dhlPoint2: Authentic origin documentation, CE compliance, invoice
shipping.dhlConclusion: We do not work with questionable grey-import solutions — the process is lawful, transparent and documented, so everything can be verified afterwards for authorities and tax offices.
shipping.step1: Consultation and confirmation — we select the ideal configuration, sign the contract and lock the deadline.
shipping.step2: Manufacturing and quality control — the machine is built to specification and passes the factory QC process.
shipping.step3: International shipping and customs — our partner ships to Hungary under DDP terms, we handle customs clearance.
shipping.step4: Arrival and final check — the machine arrives at our warehouse where we inspect, commission and prepare it for handover.
shipping.step5: Handover, installation and training — personal pickup or delivery with on-site professional training.
shipping.personalPickupDesc: The best and fastest option — you see the machine, we discuss installation, complete the training, and you take the device home yourself. Personal pickup is always free of charge.
shipping.pickupBenefit1: Free, immediate pickup at a pre-agreed time
shipping.pickupBenefit2: On-site commissioning, parameter setup and professional training
shipping.pickupBenefit3: Personal handover of documentation and answers to every question
shipping.pickupNote: Personal pickup by prior appointment. Booking: call us or send an email.
shipping.homeDeliveryDesc: If personal pickup is not feasible, our contracted courier service delivers across Hungary, with individual pricing based on the size and weight of the machine and the delivery location.
shipping.homeDeliveryNote1: The exact delivery fee is quoted when your order is confirmed.
shipping.homeDeliveryNote2: Floor delivery and commissioning available for an additional fee, by prior agreement.
shipping.cardPaymentDesc: SimplePay integrated card payment — VISA, Mastercard, Maestro accepted. Secure 3D Secure transaction with instant confirmation.
shipping.bankTransferDesc: Pro-forma invoice based bank transfer — we send the account details after order confirmation. Production starts immediately after payment.
shipping.interestFreeDesc: For custom-built machines the purchase price can be paid in two installments, interest-free and without extra cost. No loan application, no bank paperwork needed.
shipping.depositNote: Due at contract signing — production starts at this point.
shipping.remainingNote: Due when the machine arrives, before handover.
shipping.installmentOptions: Longer terms available under separate agreement
shipping.3monthsDesc: Equal monthly installments, interest-free — simple and flexible.
shipping.6monthsDesc: Half-year installment, equal monthly charges, 0% interest exposure.
shipping.12monthsDesc: Under individual agreement for our premium partners — 1-year interest-free term.
shipping.oneTimePaymentDesc: If you pay the full price in one go (bank transfer or card), we grant an extra discount — the exact amount is agreed during consultation, depending on the machine type and configuration.
shipping.oneTimePaymentNote: The discount applies to every sale item and custom-built machine.
shipping.installmentMinNote: Installment plan terms are subject to individual assessment and valid based on a written agreement.
shipping.supportDesc: We provide a personal contact person before, during and after the purchase — no call centers, no ticketing systems. Direct contact, in your language.
shipping.supportPoint1: Personal contact person from contract signing to handover
shipping.supportPoint2: Phone and email availability during business hours
shipping.supportPoint3: Shipping, customs, commissioning — all handled by one team
shipping.supportGoal: Our goal is to stand by you every step of the way until the machine arrives and your business launches.
shipping.ctaSubtitle: Call us or book a free consultation — we give personalized answers to every individual question.
